text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 The Lebanese General Directorate of State Security announces the death of 13 members as a result of the targeting of the Nabatieh Government Serail building. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam on the Israeli attack against State Security personnel: “This painful tragedy increases our determination to reach a ceasefire that protects Lebanon and our people in the South.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩国家安全总局宣布，由于纳巴泰政府大楼遭到袭击，已有13名成员死亡。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆就以色列针对国家安全人员的袭击表示：“这场痛苦的悲剧增加了我们达成停火协议的决心，以保护黎巴嫩和我们在南部的民众。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Fox: Israeli intelligence officials report that Iran is charging tolls to transit the Strait of Hormuz safely, seeking to further their control of the vital shipping route ahead of negotiations in Islamabad. "An Israeli intelligence official tells Fox News Iran is indeed demanding fees for the few vessels it's allowing to pass through the Strait Of Hormuz. This official adds the Strait is effectively under full IRGC control. They decide who gets to go through, but more importantly, who doesn't. I am told that there is intelligence being shared in the intel community about how Iran is trying to tighten its grip on this Strait ahead of the negotiations this weekend. Overnight, president Trump taking to True Social to talk about the issue saying, quote, Iran is doing a very poor job, dishonorable, some would say, of allowing oil to go to the straight of Hormuz. That is not the agreement we have. With just eight vessels" @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 福克斯新闻：以色列情报官员报告称，伊朗正在对通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收取通行费，试图在伊斯兰堡谈判前进一步加强对这一重要航道的控制。“一位以色列情报官员告诉福克斯新闻，伊朗确实在对其允许通过霍尔木兹海峡的少数船只收取费用。该官员补充说，海峡实际上已完全处于伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的控制之下。他们决定谁可以通过，更重要的是，谁不能通过。我被告知，情报界正在分享有关伊朗如何试图在周末谈判前加强对该海峡控制的情报。昨晚，特朗普总统在“真实社交”（True Social）上谈到这个问题时说，引用如下：伊朗在允许石油通过霍尔木兹海峡方面做得非常糟糕，甚至可以说是可耻的。这不是我们达成的协议。只有八艘船。” @wfwitness

text: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇱 / 🇮🇷 NEW: Iran has rebuilt Yahyabad railway bridge in Kashan, after it was bombed by Israel on April 7th Reconstruction efforts around the country, especially of vital infrastructure, are progressing at a rapid pace. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇱 / 🇮🇷 最新消息：伊朗已重建卡尚的 Yahyabad 铁路桥，该桥曾于 4 月 7 日被以色列轰炸。全国各地的重建工作，特别是重要基础设施的重建，正在快速推进。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "❗️A Hezbullah drone attack today severely injured one Jewish soldier and another soldier moderately." It was my darling the FPV against a Humvee 😮‍💨
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“❗️真主党今天的一次无人机袭击导致一名犹太士兵重伤，另一名士兵中度受伤。” 那是我心爱的 FPV 无人机袭击了一辆悍马车 😮‍💨

text: Trump considered firing Tulsi Gabbard after being frustrated with her less supportive stance on the Iran War. He even questioned her loyalty in private and began asking advisers whether she should be replaced. However, longtime ally Roger Stone stepped in and persuaded him to keep her, arguing that she had been loyal, didn’t deserve to be fired, and that removing her could create bad press and even boost her as a potential political rival. Source: Axios
text_zh: 特朗普因对图尔西·加巴德在伊朗战争问题上不够支持的态度感到沮丧，曾考虑解雇她。他甚至私下质疑她的忠诚度，并开始询问顾问是否应该撤换她。然而，长期盟友罗杰·斯通介入并说服他留任她，理由是她一直很忠诚，不应该被解雇，而且撤换她可能会造成负面新闻，甚至可能使她成为潜在的政治对手。来源：Axios

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Preliminary reports that 8 state security officials have been killed in the Israeli attack on a governmental institution in Nabatieh, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Lebanese General Directorate of State Security announces the death of 13 members as a result of the targeting of the Nabatieh Government Serail building. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 初步报告显示，在以色列对黎巴嫩南部纳巴泰一处政府机构的袭击中，有 8 名国家安全官员丧生。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩国家安全总局宣布，由于纳巴泰政府大楼遭到袭击，已有 13 名成员死亡。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to The War Reporter: "🇰🇼🇮🇷 — Kuwaiti Army says it has dealt with 7 Iranian drone attacks over the past 24 hours."The attacks targeted several vital facilities affiliated with the National Guard, resulting in injuries among some of its members," the statement added."
text_zh: ↩️ 回复战争记者：“🇰🇼🇮🇷 — 科威特军方称，过去 24 小时内处理了 7 起伊朗无人机袭击事件。”声明补充说：“袭击目标是国民警卫队所属的几个重要设施，导致部分成员受伤。”

text: 🇮🇹 Italian Foreign Minister Antonio Tajani said he spoke to the Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and expressed solidarity for the “unjustified and unacceptable attacks he is suffering from Israel.” “We want to avoid there being a second Gaza. We will reiterate this concept to the Israeli Ambassador as well, whom I have summoned to the Farnesina. We condemn the bombings on the Lebanese civilian population, including the gunfire incidents suffered by our UNIFIL [UN Interim Force in Lebanon] troops, for which we continue to demand guarantees of total safety. We must absolutely avoid any further expansion of the conflict that would jeopardise the ceasefire in Iran and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz,” Tajani added. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇹 意大利外交部长安东尼奥·塔亚尼表示，他与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩进行了交谈，并对“他所遭受的来自以色列的无理且不可接受的袭击”表示声援。“我们希望避免出现第二个加沙。我们将向以色列大使重申这一观点，我已经传唤他到法尔内西纳宫。我们谴责对黎巴嫩平民的轰炸，包括我们的联黎部队（联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队）士兵遭受的枪击事件，我们继续要求对他们的绝对安全提供保障。我们必须绝对避免冲突进一步扩大，否则将危及伊朗的停火和霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放，”塔亚尼补充道。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "Aoun, the president, their commander issued a very shy and weak statement on the matter" Maybe because the majority of them where Muslim Shia and not as important as a water pipe in a Christian town
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“奥恩总统，他们的指挥官就此事发表了一份非常羞怯和软弱的声明” 也许是因为他们中的大多数是什叶派穆斯林，不像基督教城镇的水管那么重要

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇸🇮❌🇮🇱 Slovenia joins Spain’s effort to suspend the EU–Israel Association Agreement. ℹ️The EU–Israel Association Agreement is a treaty between the European Union and Israel that sets the terms for their trade, political cooperation, and broader relations.…" 🇪🇸 In a post on X, Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said Netanyahu’s “contempt for life and international law is intolerable” in light of the attacks. “It’s time to speak clearly: – Lebanon must be included in the ceasefire. – The international community must condemn this new violation of international law. – The European Union must suspend its Association Agreement with Israel. – And there must be no impunity for these criminal acts,” Sanchez said. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇸🇮❌🇮🇱 斯洛文尼亚加入西班牙的行列，要求暂停欧盟-以色列联系国协定。ℹ️欧盟-以色列联系国协定是欧盟与以色列之间的一项条约，规定了双方贸易、政治合作及更广泛关系的条款……” 🇪🇸 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯在 X 上发帖称，鉴于这些袭击，内塔尼亚胡对“生命和国际法的蔑视是不可容忍的”。“现在是明确表态的时候了：——黎巴嫩必须被纳入停火范围。——国际社会必须谴责这一新的违反国际法的行为。——欧盟必须暂停与以色列的联系国协定。——这些犯罪行为绝不能逍遥法外，”桑切斯说。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部纳哈里亚及对抗线周边地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳及对抗线周边地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Iranian Parliament speaker Ghalibaf reports that the only two things not mutually agreed upon with the U.S. is including Lebanon in the ceasefire and releasing frozen Iranian assets. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫报告称，与美国未达成共识的两件事是：将黎巴嫩纳入停火范围以及释放被冻结的伊朗资产。@wfwitness

text: ❗️ 13 members of the Lebanese state Security force who operate under the command of the Lebanese president have been killed in an Israeli attack on their well known building near the Lebanese Government HQ in Nabatieh Aoun, the president, their commander issued a very shy and weak statement on the matter He continues to view their blood as mere noise in the path to normalize with Israel and suck up to his patrons in the U.S administration
text_zh: ❗️ 13 名隶属于黎巴嫩总统指挥下的黎巴嫩国家安全部队成员在以色列对纳巴泰黎巴嫩政府总部附近的一座知名建筑的袭击中丧生。奥恩总统，他们的指挥官就此事发表了一份非常羞怯和软弱的声明。他继续将他们的鲜血视为与以色列关系正常化以及讨好美国政府赞助人道路上的噪音。

text: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 Zelensky, being the shyster he is, keeps selling "Ukrainian AD capabilities" to the GCC states. But there is a nuance... To Ukrainian mobile fire teams: if your radio isn’t calling “Volga,” you’re considered a priority target. Video: @stalins_sokol 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 泽连斯基作为一个骗子，一直在向海湾合作委员会国家兜售“乌克兰防空能力”。但有一个细微差别……对乌克兰移动火力小组：如果你的无线电没有呼叫“伏尔加”，你将被视为优先目标。视频：@stalins_sokol 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🟡 Zionist Army Radio: Hezbollah has fired more than 30 rockets towards the northern occupied territories since this morning.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🟡 犹太复国主义军队电台：自今天早上以来，真主党已向北部被占领土发射了 30 多枚火箭弹。

text: ELINT News RT @Osinttechnical : Ukrainian specialists shot down Iranian Shahed attack drones across several Middle Eastern countries during the Iran War -President Zelensky The teams also directly integrated into Gulf countries' air defense systems, providing them with Ukrainian battle experience. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042494723441492164/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @Osinttechnical：泽连斯基总统称，在伊朗战争期间，乌克兰专家在多个中东国家击落了伊朗的“见证者”攻击型无人机。这些小组还直接整合到海湾国家的防空系统中，为他们提供了乌克兰的战斗经验。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042494723441492164/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The Trump administration is expected to demand the release of at least six American citizens held in Iran as part of the negotiations. - Washington Post tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据《华盛顿邮报》推文报道，特朗普政府预计将在谈判中要求释放至少六名被关押在伊朗的美国公民。

text: WarTranslated Zelensky confirmed for the first time that Ukrainian forces shot down Shaheds in the Middle East during the US-Israel war with Iran. He said it was not a training mission but actual combat using Ukrainian-made interceptor drones. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：泽连斯基首次证实，在美以与伊朗的战争期间，乌克兰军队在中东击落了“见证者”无人机。他说这不是训练任务，而是使用乌克兰制造的拦截无人机进行的实际战斗。推文

text: Open Source Intel CNN REPORT: U.S. President Donald Trump had a “tense” phone call with Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, according to U.S. and Israeli sources familiar with the conversation. The call reportedly came shortly before Israel announced steps toward direct ceasefire talks with Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：CNN 报道：据熟悉谈话的美国和以色列消息人士称，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普与总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡进行了“紧张”的通话。据报道，这次通话发生在以色列宣布与黎巴嫩进行直接停火谈判的步骤前不久。推文

text: Open Source Intel Spain’s PM Sánchez says the country is ready to move toward a joint European army, “even tomorrow if needed.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042617589558317154/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：西班牙首相桑切斯表示，该国已准备好迈向联合欧洲军队，“如果需要，明天就可以”。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042617589558317154/photo/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @TreyYingst : There’s new information being shared in the intelligence community indicating that the IRGC is using the ceasefire window to carry out operations that tighten its grip on this critical choke point, I'm told. We have reached out to shipping companies to see if they paid the fee to pass. Only a handful of vessels have transited the Strait since the ceasefire began. tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @TreyYingst：我被告知，情报界正在分享新信息，表明伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队正在利用停火窗口进行行动，以加强对这一关键咽喉要道的控制。我们已联系航运公司，看他们是否支付了通行费。自停火开始以来，只有少数船只通过了海峡。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @guyelster : The Trump administration intends to request the release of Americans detained in Iran as part of upcoming negotiations: Washington Post tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @guyelster：特朗普政府打算在即将到来的谈判中要求释放被关押在伊朗的美国人：《华盛顿邮报》推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Speaker of Iran’s Parliament says ceasefire in Lebanon and release of blocked Iranian assets must occur before negotiations begin. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042616988153815343/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息：伊朗议会议长表示，在谈判开始前，必须实现黎巴嫩停火并释放被冻结的伊朗资产。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042616988153815343/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @Easybakeovensz : A lot of accounts are sharing this image claiming it's evidence that the Iranian air force dropped a bomb at a US command post. It's not. Militaries, especially the US, use inert ordnance regularly as decoration. You can see an inert bomb outside the building in an old photo. https://twitter.com/Easybakeovensz/status/2042611771446362138/photo/1 Image of the same destroyed U.S. Army command post in Kuwait, where six American servicemen were killed in an Iranian strike. The tactical operations center reportedly lacked adequate protection against direct overhead attacks and was reinforced only with T-shaped concrete barriers around its perimeter. Interestingly, the published photo also clearly shows a Soviet-era FAB-type free-fall bomb lying on the ground. Its presence remains unexplained, given that U.S. sources attribute the strike to Iranian drones. It also does not appear to have fallen from above. - OSINTWarfare tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @Easybakeovensz：许多账户都在分享这张图片，声称这是伊朗空军向美国指挥所投下炸弹的证据。事实并非如此。军队，尤其是美国军队，经常使用惰性弹药作为装饰。你可以在一张旧照片中看到大楼外有一枚惰性炸弹。https://twitter.com/Easybakeovensz/status/2042611771446362138/photo/1 图片显示了科威特被摧毁的美国陆军指挥所，六名美国军人在伊朗的袭击中丧生。据报道，战术作战中心缺乏足够的防空袭击保护，仅在周边用 T 型混凝土屏障加固。有趣的是，发布的照片还清楚地显示地面上躺着一枚苏联时代的 FAB 型自由落体炸弹。鉴于美国消息来源将袭击归咎于伊朗无人机，它的存在仍然无法解释。它看起来也不像是从上面掉下来的。- OSINTWarfare 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Iran's Ghalibaf: https://twitter.com/michaelh992/status/2042616817613422668/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 伊朗卡利巴夫：https://twitter.com/michaelh992/status/2042616817613422668/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Islamic regime military Spokesman right before negotiations: “In compliance with the message of the Leader of the Islamic Revolution, we affirm that our forces remain on high alert and with their fingers on the trigger. The leaders of America and the Zionist entity have no right to threaten the people of Iran or the invincible Islamic Resistance Front. It would be better for Trump and Netanyahu to acknowledge their defeat and not threaten the Iranian people, the fighters of the Armed Forces, and the Resistance Front. The leaders of America and the Zionist entity have no right to threaten the people of Iran or the invincible Islamic Resistance Front” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊斯兰政权军事发言人在谈判前夕表示：“根据伊斯兰革命领袖的信息，我们确认我们的部队保持高度戒备，手指扣在扳机上。美国和犹太复国主义实体的领导人无权威胁伊朗人民或不可战胜的伊斯兰抵抗阵线。特朗普和内塔尼亚胡最好承认他们的失败，不要威胁伊朗人民、武装部队战士和抵抗阵线。美国和犹太复国主义实体的领导人无权威胁伊朗人民或不可战胜的伊斯兰抵抗阵线。” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The General Staff of the Armed Forces of Ukraine announces that last night, Ukrainian forces carried out drone strikes on two Russian drilling platforms located in the northern part of the Caspian Sea. Distance to Ukraine: around 1,000km The two platforms in question are the ice-resistant stationary platform (LSP-1) at the Yuri Korchagin field and the ice-resistant stationary platform (LSP-2) at the V. Graifer field. Footage likely coming soon. /37134 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）：乌克兰武装部队总参谋部宣布，昨晚乌克兰军队对位于里海北部的两个俄罗斯钻井平台进行了无人机袭击。距离乌克兰：约 1000 公里。所涉及的两个平台是 Yuri Korchagin 油田的抗冰固定平台 (LSP-1) 和 V. Graifer 油田的抗冰固定平台 (LSP-2)。视频可能很快就会发布。/37134 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 Iran's Parliament speaker Ghalibaf: “Two of the measures mutually agreed upon between the parties have yet to be implemented: a ceasefire in Lebanon and the release of Iran’s blocked assets prior to the commencement of negotiations. These two matters must be fulfilled before negotiations begin.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：突发新闻 🔴 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：“双方达成共识的两项措施尚未实施：黎巴嫩停火和在谈判开始前释放伊朗被冻结的资产。这两件事必须在谈判开始前完成。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Iranian Parliament National Security Committee spokesman Ebrahim Rezaei: “It would be preferable our diplomats do not travel to Pakistan, but if they do, they should take a ‘Khaibar Shekan’ missile with them — so the enemy understands that if it does not submit to Iranian diplomats, it will be forced to submit to Iranian missiles.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：最新消息 🔴 伊朗议会国家安全委员会发言人易卜拉欣·礼萨伊：“最好我们的外交官不要去巴基斯坦，但如果他们去了，他们应该带上一枚‘海巴尔·谢坎’导弹——这样敌人就会明白，如果它不向伊朗外交官屈服，它将被迫向伊朗导弹屈服。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel In some ways, this is the IRGC throwing Hezbollah under the bus, effectively signaling that Israel can continue striking southern Lebanon. VERY SIGNIFICANT 🔴 Senior Iranian security official to Press TV: Tehran says it forced Israel to halt strikes in Beirut, making it a condition for joining ceasefire talks with the U.S. Iran claims its delegation’s trip to Islamabad was delayed multiple times over continued attacks, warning the talks could be canceled entirely if strikes resumed. Message from Tehran: any renewed Israeli strikes in Beirut or Dahieh will immediately end negotiations. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：在某种程度上，这是伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队抛弃真主党，实际上是在发出信号，即以色列可以继续打击黎巴嫩南部。非常重要 🔴 伊朗高级安全官员对新闻电视台（Press TV）表示：德黑兰称其迫使以色列停止了对贝鲁特的袭击，将其作为加入与美国停火谈判的条件。伊朗声称其代表团前往伊斯兰堡的行程因持续的袭击而多次推迟，并警告如果袭击恢复，谈判可能会完全取消。德黑兰发出的信息：任何以色列在贝鲁特或达希耶的重新袭击都将立即结束谈判。- 开源情报推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump endorses Palantir after the Iran war; “Just ask our enemies!!!” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042612981737857531/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：特朗普在伊朗战争后为 Palantir 背书；“去问问我们的敌人！！！” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042612981737857531/photo/1 推文

text: A The New York Times analysis verified damage to 22 schools and 17 health facilities in Iran from U.S.-Israeli strikes, though Iran’s Red Crescent says the true toll is far higher: 763 schools and 316 health facilities damaged or destroyed. Many strikes hit dense areas like Tehran, contributing to at least 1,701 civilian deaths, including children and medical workers.
text_zh: 《纽约时报》的一项分析证实，美以袭击导致伊朗 22 所学校和 17 家医疗设施受损，尽管伊朗红新月会表示实际损失要高得多：763 所学校和 316 家医疗设施受损或被毁。许多袭击击中了德黑兰等人口稠密地区，导致至少 1701 名平民死亡，其中包括儿童和医务人员。

text: This is funny and based Medvedev has been appointed chief editor of Russian high school social studies textbooks, Russia’s education ministry says.
text_zh: 这很有趣且基于事实，梅德韦杰夫已被任命为俄罗斯高中社会研究教科书的总编辑，俄罗斯教育部表示。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 IDF announces that two soldiers were injured in southern Lebanon earlier today: Earlier today (Friday), a reservist non-commissioned officer was severely injured, and an additional soldier was lightly injured as a result of shrapnel from an explosive drone that fell near the soldiers in southern Lebanon. The soldiers were evacuated to receive medical treatment in a hospital, and their families have been notified. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列国防军宣布，今天早些时候在黎巴嫩南部有两名士兵受伤：今天（周五）早些时候，一名预备役士官受重伤，另一名士兵受轻伤，原因是爆炸无人机在黎巴嫩南部士兵附近坠落产生的弹片。士兵们已被送往医院接受治疗，他们的家人已收到通知。@wfwitness

text: Medvedev has been appointed chief editor of Russian high school social studies textbooks, Russia’s education ministry says.
text_zh: 梅德韦杰夫已被任命为俄罗斯高中社会研究教科书的总编辑，俄罗斯教育部表示。

text: Iran is reportedly charging ships to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, according to an Israeli intelligence official. They say the IRGC now effectively controls the strait—deciding which vessels can pass—and may be using the ceasefire period to strengthen its hold on this key route. Source: Fox News
text_zh: 据一位以色列情报官员称，据报道，伊朗正在对通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收费。他们说，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队现在实际上控制了海峡——决定哪些船只可以通过——并可能利用停火期来加强对这一关键航线的控制。来源：福克斯新闻

text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez: Let us not allow a new Gaza in Lebanon. In the face of violations of international law, Europe must act consistently if it wants the rest of the world to support us.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯：不要让黎巴嫩出现第二个加沙。面对违反国际法的行为，如果欧洲希望世界其他地区支持我们，就必须采取一致行动。

text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez: We are ready to move forward with a common European army. Not in ten years or two — but now. As soon as tomorrow.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯：我们准备好推进建立一支共同的欧洲军队。不是十年或两年后——而是现在。明天就可以。

text: 🇮🇷 BREAKING! Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf: Two of the measures mutually agreed upon between the parties have yet to be implemented: a ceasefire in Lebanon and the release of Iran’s blocked assets prior to the commencement of negotiations. These two matters must be fulfilled before negotiations begin. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 突发新闻！伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫：双方达成共识的两项措施尚未实施：黎巴嫩停火和在谈判开始前释放伊朗被冻结的资产。这两件事必须在谈判开始前完成。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
